fields.Name: Predictive Studio Maintenance
fields.Description: Runs the Predictive Studio maintenance pass (plan §12 / SP10) on a recurring cadence over the MJ: ML Model Scoring Bindings: staleness detection (cadence / data-volume / drift), scheduled re-scoring of Mode='Scheduled' bindings, and retraining triggers for stale models (retrain the same pipeline into a new immutable version, compare the challenger's holdout metrics against the incumbent, and produce a promotion RECOMMENDATION). It NEVER auto-promotes — promotion remains a separate signed-off Action (PS-AGENT-7). The action driver wraps the MaintenanceEngine.runMaintenancePass(bindings, policy, deps) entry in @memberjunction/predictive-studio. Default cadence is weekly (Sundays 3 AM UTC); administrators can adjust the CronExpression. Disabled until the PredictiveStudio.RunMaintenancePass action lands with the SP10 action/Remote-Op tranche; set Status='Active' to enable. WIRING NOTE: when that action lands, add Configuration.ActionID = '@lookup:MJ: Actions.DriverClass=PredictiveStudioRunMaintenancePassAction'. It is intentionally omitted today because the action does not yet exist and an unresolvable @lookup hard-fails (and rolls back) the entire scheduled-jobs push.
